---
name: Pull request
about: Contribute code, docs, or fixes
title: "[PR] "
---

## What does this change?

A short description.

## Why?

What problem does it solve? Link any related issues.

## How did you test it?

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`python -m pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] New code has tests
- [ ] I ran the relevant demo script and it still works

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing style (look at neighboring files)
- [ ] I added docstrings to public functions
- [ ] I updated the relevant doc if I changed the public API
- [ ] I didn't add any new linter warnings

## Screenshots / output

If this is a visual change or a new benchmark, paste the output.
